findings.problemShort: elements must meet minimum color contrast ratio thresholds
findings.solutionShort: ensure the contrast between foreground and background colors meets wcag 2 aa minimum contrast ratio thresholds
findings.solutionLong:
Fix any of the following:
  Element has insufficient color contrast of 3.99 (foreground color: #ff0000, background color: #ffffff, font size: 12.0pt (16px), font weight: normal). Expected contrast ratio of 4.5:1

issue.title: Accessibility issue: Elements must meet minimum color contrast ratio thresholds on /vet/Leptospirosis2021.htm

pullRequest.title: [WIP] Fix accessibility issue with color contrast on Leptospirosis page
